title: cyperus hensii
intro: Cyperus hensii, also known as the Henslow's flatsedge or Henslow's cyperus, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a type of aquatic plant that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which are said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and preventing infections. In herbal preparations, Cyperus hensii is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used to make tinctures and ointments for topical application.
